title: American Poultry Bake
description: Moist and savory, this dish combines the richness of poultry with the comfort of a classic American casserole.
instructions: Season the chicken with salt and pepper.
In a large skillet, heat a couple tablespoons of oil over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned on both sides.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 20-25 minutes, or until cooked through.
While the chicken is baking, combine the bake glaze, savory silk, and rich cream in a small saucepan.
Bring the mixture to a simmer over medium heat, whisking constantly.
Reduce the heat to low and let the glaze simmer for 5-7 minutes, or until thickened to your liking.
Remove the chicken from the oven and brush the glaze all over the top.
Return the chicken to the oven and bake for an additional 5-7 minutes, or until the glaze is caramelized and the chicken is cooked through.
Let the chicken rest for a few minutes before slicing and serving.
